tests_added: tests/unit/metrics/aggregator.test.ts: computePacketLoss - returns 0 for an empty array
tests/unit/metrics/aggregator.test.ts: computePacketLoss - returns 0 when all samples are successful
tests/unit/metrics/aggregator.test.ts: computePacketLoss - returns 1 when all samples failed (Infinity RTT)
tests/unit/metrics/aggregator.test.ts: computePacketLoss - returns correct ratio for mixed success/failure
tests/unit/metrics/aggregator.test.ts: computePacketLoss - returns correct ratio for a single successful sample
tests/unit/metrics/aggregator.test.ts: computePacketLoss - returns correct ratio for a single failed sample
tests/unit/metrics/aggregator.test.ts: computePacketLoss - treats statusCode 0 with finite RTT as a failure
tests/unit/metrics/aggregator.test.ts: estimateBandwidth - returns 0 for an empty array
tests/unit/metrics/aggregator.test.ts: estimateBandwidth - returns 0 when all entries have zero transferSize (cross-origin)
tests/unit/metrics/aggregator.test.ts: estimateBandwidth - returns 0 when all entries have zero duration
tests/unit/metrics/aggregator.test.ts: estimateBandwidth - computes correct mean throughput in Mbps for valid entries
tests/unit/metrics/aggregator.test.ts: estimateBandwidth - excludes entries with zero transferSize from the mean
tests/unit/metrics/aggregator.test.ts: estimateBandwidth - excludes entries with zero duration from the mean
tests/unit/metrics/aggregator.test.ts: estimateBandwidth - handles a single valid entry
tests/unit/metrics/aggregator.test.ts: MetricsAggregator - produces a complete snapshot with all fields populated when both sources available
tests/unit/metrics/aggregator.test.ts: MetricsAggregator - returns preset snapshot when preset is active, ignoring live data
tests/unit/metrics/aggregator.test.ts: MetricsAggregator - returns snapshot with zero RTT/jitter when ProbeSampler is missing
tests/unit/metrics/aggregator.test.ts: MetricsAggregator - returns snapshot with zero bandwidth when ResourceTimingCollector is missing
tests/unit/metrics/aggregator.test.ts: MetricsAggregator - does not crash when all sources are missing
tests/unit/metrics/aggregator.test.ts: MetricsAggregator - subscription fires on each tick
tests/unit/metrics/aggregator.test.ts: MetricsAggregator - unsubscribe stops delivery
tests/unit/metrics/aggregator.test.ts: MetricsAggregator - stop() prevents further ticks and does not leak timers
tests/unit/metrics/aggregator.test.ts: MetricsAggregator - start() is idempotent — calling it twice does not create duplicate timers
tests/unit/metrics/aggregator.test.ts: MetricsAggregator - uses default cadence of 2000ms when not specified
tests/unit/metrics/aggregator.test.ts: MetricsAggregator - getSnapshot returns valid zero-value defaults before first tick
tests/unit/metrics/aggregator.test.ts: MetricsAggregator - computes packetLoss from probe samples with failures
tests/unit/metrics/aggregator.test.ts: MetricsAggregator - computes bandwidth from resource timing entries
